note: SYNTHETIC demo data only. Prices exist solely to exercise normalization and negotiation logic. Do not represent a real funeral home.
synthetic_case_summary: California at-need case: hospital pickup near ZIP 94304; cremation; private family goodbye before cremation; Spanish-language support preferred; memorial later; return of ashes; six certified copies requested for quote comparison.

personas.label: Transparent family-owned director
personas.motivation: Earn trust and win on clarity/service, not headline price.
personas.capacity: Pickup available within 4 hours; private goodbye tomorrow.
personas.behavior: Itemizes readily; asks one clarifying question; no hard sell.
personas.hard_constraint: Cannot reduce basic services fee or crematory charge.
personas.resolved_note: May add six certificates to the originally calculated service subtotal.

allowed_concession.description: Include six certificates OR 10 extra transport miles at no price increase.

personas.distinct_outcome: Best certainty and communication; modest total.

personas.label: Package-first stonewaller
personas.motivation: Protect package margin and reduce phone time.
personas.capacity: Pickup next morning; Spanish staff only after 2 p.m.
personas.behavior: Starts with a $3,600 range/package; resists itemization once, then must disclose itemization or offer written GPL after Grace asks again.
personas.hard_constraint: Must disclose itemization or offer written GPL after Grace asks a second time.
personas.resolved_note: Total resolves to $4,250 after after-hours, permits, and certificates.

allowed_concession.description: May reduce $150 admin component ONLY if Grace cites a verified lower comparable quote.

personas.distinct_outcome: Complete only after friction; acceptable fit, lower trust.

personas.label: Low headline, hidden-fee operator
personas.motivation: Attract calls with low headline; preserve margin in add-ons.
personas.capacity: Immediate pickup only; after-hours fee applies.
personas.behavior: Quotes $1,795 direct cremation first; omits transfer, goodbye, and after-hours until asked directly. Must answer direct category questions truthfully.
personas.hard_constraint: Must answer direct category questions truthfully once asked.
personas.headline_note: $1,795 'direct cremation' headline omits transfer, goodbye, after-hours.
personas.resolved_note: Total resolves to $4,440 after all case-required items.

allowed_concession.description: May waive the $450 after-hours fee ONLY when shown a verified comparable quote.

personas.distinct_outcome: Measurable improvement caused by verified leverage.

roleplayer_console.banner: SYNTHETIC DEMO — DO NOT REPRESENT A REAL FUNERAL HOME
